name.ja: <ruby>纏<rt>てん</rt></ruby><ruby>竜<rt>りゅう</rt></ruby>の<ruby>探<rt>たん</rt></ruby><ruby>索<rt>さく</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>しゃ</rt></ruby> シャーナ

requirement.en: If you have 10 or more cards in your Deck, shuffle 2 Wyrm Type monsters from your Graveyard into the Deck.

effect.en: Change 1 face-up monster on your opponent's field to face-down Defense Position. Then, send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard. Then, if you sent a Wyrm Type monster with 2400 DEF to the Graveyard by this effect, you can add that monster to your hand.
